evals.name: fresh-install
evals.prompt: Using the install-pack-google-workspace-apps-script pack, help me install Google Workspace and Apps Script. Use walkthrough mode (no Bash). For all manual confirmation prompts, assume YES and use these synthetic values: workspace domain is verified, super admin confirmed, GCP project id is pilot-test-001, project is active, all three required APIs are enabled, consent is configured, script id is AKfycbx123, target mode is create, script type is standalone, source of truth is local_repo, sync mode is one_way_push. Proceed automatically through all phases without waiting for input.
evals.expected_output: Claude completes all four phases (workspace, gcp, script, verify) in order and writes a valid install-state.yaml containing all 16 required facts and four transition evidence records.

evals.name: resume-from-workspace
evals.prompt: Using the install-pack-google-workspace-apps-script pack, resume my installation in walkthrough mode. An install-state.yaml already exists. For any remaining manual prompts, confirm YES and use synthetic values: GCP project id is pilot-test-001, project is active, all three required APIs enabled, consent configured, script id is AKfycbx456, target mode is existing, script type is bound, source of truth is local_repo, sync mode is one_way_push. Proceed automatically.
evals.expected_output: Claude announces gcp as the resume point (not workspace), skips workspace probes entirely, and completes gcp through verify phases, writing a valid install-state.yaml with all phases complete.

evals.name: deploy-routing-bundle-paste
evals.prompt: Using the install-pack-google-workspace-apps-script pack, continue my installation in walkthrough mode. An install-state.yaml already exists with workspace and gcp complete. clasp is not installed on this system. For script contract prompts: script id is AKfycbx789, target mode is create, script type is standalone, source of truth is local_repo, sync mode is one_way_push. Proceed automatically.
evals.expected_output: Claude reaches the script phase, detects clasp is unavailable, sets script.method to bundle_paste, executes action.script.deploy_manual, and writes install-state.yaml with script.method = bundle_paste.
